title: PREAH VIHEAR—Our reporters documented damage ...
highlights: PREAH VIHEAR—Our reporters documented damage across the Preah Vihear Temple complex, capturing visual evidence of destruction following the Thai military aggression. The damage has forced conservation and restoration efforts at the Preah Vihear Temple site to halt, as unexploded ordnance and the deterioration of structural elements across nearly the entire complex make repair work significantly more challenging. The temple, inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2008 by UNESCO, is one of Cambodia’s most significant cultural heritage sites | Cambodianess | Facebook
